languages.text: {n}Абеляр впервые позволяет себе заминку, переводя взгляд с вас на Себериана и обратно, будто желая удостовериться в серьезности вашей просьбы. Но когда сенешаль начинает говорить, в его голосе звучит вызов, а взгляд прикован к Ларии:{/n} "Перед вами {mf|Его|Ее} Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} величайшего протектората {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Простора Коронус{/g} и держатель{mf||ница} священного {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Патента{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Абеляр впервые позволяет себе заминку, переводя взгляд с вас на Себериана и обратно, будто желая удостовериться в серьезности вашей просьбы. Но когда сенешаль начинает говорить, в его голосе звучит вызов, а взгляд прикован к Ларии:{/n} "Перед вами {mf|Его|Ее} Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} величайшего протектората {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Простора Коронус{/g} и держатель{mf||ница} священного {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Патента{/g}".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}Абеляр впервые позволяет себе заминку, переводя взгляд с вас на Себериана и обратно, будто желая удостовериться в серьезности вашей просьбы. Но когда сенешаль начинает говорить, в его голосе звучит вызов, а взгляд прикован к Ларии:{/n} "Перед вами {mf|Его|Ее} Светлость {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Вольный Торговец{/g} {name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} величайшего протектората {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Простора Коронус{/g} и держатель{mf||ница} священного {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Патента{/g}".

{n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

{n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德头一回显露出些许迟疑，目光在你与塞贝里安之间游移，仿佛想确认你是不是真要他这么做。可当总领开口时，语气里却多了分挑衅的意味，他的双眼直盯着菈丽雅：{/n}“站在你面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}科罗努斯扩区{/g}最大属地的继承人，神圣{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}贸易授状{/g}的持有者。”
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德头一回显露出些许迟疑，目光在你与塞贝里安之间游移，仿佛想确认你是不是真要他这么做。可当总领开口时，语气里却多了分挑衅的意味，他的双眼直盯着菈丽雅：{/n}“站在你面前的，是尊贵的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}行商浪人{/g}{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}科罗努斯扩区{/g}最大属地的继承人，神圣{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}贸易授状{/g}的持有者。”

languages.text: {n}Abélard semble hésiter pour la toute première fois, posant tour à tour son regard sur vous et sur Seberian, comme s'il voulait s'assurer que vous ne plaisantez pas. Mais lorsqu'il prend enfin la parole, vous décelez une note de défi dans sa voix, et ses yeux restent rivés sur Laria :{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie {mf|le|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|héritier|héritière} du plus grand protectorat des {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Étendues de Koronus{/g} et {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}lettre de marque{/g} sacrée. »
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abélard semble hésiter pour la toute première fois, posant tour à tour son regard sur vous et sur Seberian, comme s'il voulait s'assurer que vous ne plaisantez pas. Mais lorsqu'il prend enfin la parole, vous décelez une note de défi dans sa voix, et ses yeux restent rivés sur Laria :{/n} « Vous êtes en présence de Sa Seigneurie {mf|le|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|héritier|héritière} du plus grand protectorat des {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Étendues de Koronus{/g} et {mf|détenteur|détentrice} de la {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}lettre de marque{/g} sacrée. »

languages.text: {n}Abelard, sanki talebinin ciddiyetinden emin olmak istercesine bakışlarını senin üzerinden önce Seberian'a, ardından da tekrar sana kaydırarak ilk kez bir tereddüt emaresi sergiliyor. Ancak Seneşal konuşmaya başladığında sesindeki meydan okuyan tınıyı fark ediyorsun. Gözlerini de Laria'ya dikiyor.{/n} "Karşınızda {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Enginliği'ndeki{/g} en büyük protektoranın vârisi ve kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Ruhsatname'nin{/g} Hamili {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} {mf|Lord|Leydi} {name} von Valancius Hazretleri duruyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard, sanki talebinin ciddiyetinden emin olmak istercesine bakışlarını senin üzerinden önce Seberian'a, ardından da tekrar sana kaydırarak ilk kez bir tereddüt emaresi sergiliyor. Ancak Seneşal konuşmaya başladığında sesindeki meydan okuyan tınıyı fark ediyorsun. Gözlerini de Laria'ya dikiyor.{/n} "Karşınızda {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Enginliği'ndeki{/g} en büyük protektoranın vârisi ve kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Ruhsatname'nin{/g} Hamili {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Hür Tacir{/g} {mf|Lord|Leydi} {name} von Valancius Hazretleri duruyor."

languages.text: {n}Abelard titubea al principio, mirando en dirección a Seberian y luego hacia ti, como si quisiera asegurarse de que tu petición va en serio. Cuando el Senescal empieza a hablar, notas un cierto tono de desafío y no aparta la mirada de Laria:{/n} «Se encuentran ante {mf|milord, el|milady, la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Comerciante Independiente{/g} {name} von Valancius, hereder{mf|o|a} del mayor protectorado de la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Extensión de Koronus{/g} y portador{mf||a} de la sagrada {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Patente{/g}».
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard titubea al principio, mirando en dirección a Seberian y luego hacia ti, como si quisiera asegurarse de que tu petición va en serio. Cuando el Senescal empieza a hablar, notas un cierto tono de desafío y no aparta la mirada de Laria:{/n} «Se encuentran ante {mf|milord, el|milady, la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Comerciante Independiente{/g} {name} von Valancius, hereder{mf|o|a} del mayor protectorado de la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Extensión de Koronus{/g} y portador{mf||a} de la sagrada {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Patente{/g}».

languages.text: {n}Abelard scheint erstmals zu zögern und lässt seinen Blick zwischen dir und Seberian hin- und herschweifen, als wolle er sicherstellen, dass du deine Forderung ernst meinst. Als der Truchsess das Wort ergreift, ist seine Stimme allerdings vollkommen ruhig und seine Augen sind fest auf Laria gerichtet:{/n} "Vor Euch steht {mf|Seine Lordschaft|Ihre Ladyschaft}, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} des mächtigsten Protektorats der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} und {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Handelsbriefs{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard scheint erstmals zu zögern und lässt seinen Blick zwischen dir und Seberian hin- und herschweifen, als wolle er sicherstellen, dass du deine Forderung ernst meinst. Als der Truchsess das Wort ergreift, ist seine Stimme allerdings vollkommen ruhig und seine Augen sind fest auf Laria gerichtet:{/n} "Vor Euch steht {mf|Seine Lordschaft|Ihre Ladyschaft}, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g} {name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} des mächtigsten Protektorats der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} und {mf|Träger|Trägerin} des heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Handelsbriefs{/g}."

languages.text: {n}アベラードは初めて躊躇の兆しを見せ、視線をあなたからセベリア、そしてあなたに戻す。あなたの要求が本気かどうか確かめたいかのように。しかし、家令長が話しかける時、彼の声には挑発のニュアンスが入り、視線はラリアに向けられる。{/n}「あなたの前には、{mf|殿|女殿} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}ローグ・トレーダー{/g} {name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスが立っています。{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}コロヌス・エクスパンス{/g}で最も大きな保護領の相続人であり、聖なる{g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}令状{/g}の担い手であられる。」
languages.original_text: {n}Abelard shows a hint of hesitation for the first time, shifting his gaze from you to Seberian and back again, as if wishing to make sure you are serious about your request. But when the Seneschal begins to speak, there is note of challenge in his voice, and his eyes are fixed on Laria:{/n} "Before you stands {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTrader}Rogue Trader{/g} {name} von Valancius, heir to the greatest protectorate in the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanse}Koronus Expanse{/g} and bearer of the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:Warrant}Warrant{/g}."
